level.name: UR-Level
level.definition: Ultimate Reality (UR). The absolute, uncreated, self-existent reality of the triune God. It is the Origin Point of all lower realities and is not bound by time, space, or material thermodynamics.

level.name: CR-Level
level.definition: Created Reality (CR). The objective substrate of existence generated by UR via Procedural Compilation (Render_FOR). It contains two sub-categories of being.

mr.name: Material Reality (MR)
mr.description: The physical, spatiotemporal cosmos. Substrate for physics, biology, and computation (e.g., stones, silicon chips, biological brains).

sr.name: Spiritual Reality (SR)
sr.description: The created non-physical, ontological substance. Substrate for pneumatic and angelic existence (e.g., angels, demons, the human spirit, the throne room of God).

entity_mapping.human: A synthesized entity existing simultaneously in MR (body) and SR (spirit).

level.critical_rule: Only an entity possessing an SR component has the capacity to access an NR (Noetic Reality).

level.name: sCR-Level
level.definition: sub-Created Reality (sCR). The realm of understanding, imagination, and subjective experience. It is the internal world rendered within an entity capable of consciousness.

lr.name: Linguistic Reality (LR)
lr.description: The structural toolset of communication, words, logic, and mathematics used to organize, build, and share meaning across NR spaces.

nr.name: Noetic Reality (NR)
nr.description: The subjective realm of human consciousness. *Math is in NR. Science is in NR. Thinking is in NR.* A human being lives entirely within their own NR.

sub_creation_types.type_1: Sub-create for real world understanding (e.g., Science, Engineering, Mapping MR to NR).
sub_creation_types.type_2: Sub-create for imagination (e.g., Art, Fiction, Theoretical Math).

nr_to_mr_bridge.description: Since humans live entirely within their NR, objective contact with MR would be impossible except for the constant, mathematically perfect `Render_FOR` executed by God (UR), which actively bridges the MR data into the human NR for accurate assessment.

covenant.name: Adamic Covenant
covenant.definition: In Genesis 2, God (UR) granted the human (MR+SR entity) specific operational authorities and duties to manage the CR substrate through their sCR processing power.

summary_equations.equation: GR (Global Reality) = MR + SR + LR + NR
summary_equations.description: GR represents the total, composite interactive environment that a human entity interfaces with and holds Social Accountability within.
